name: alexa-control
description: Control Amazon Alexa devices, routines, smart-home actions, and playback from Codex on macOS.

interface.shortDescription: Control Alexa devices, routines, smart-home commands, and playback
interface.longDescription: Use Alexa Control to send Alexa voice commands, run routines, control Echo playback and volume, manage Bluetooth pairing, and trigger smart-home actions from Codex on macOS.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Alexa Control to turn devices on or off, run routines, make Alexa speak, or control Echo playback from Codex.
